rationale: Both independently rediscover the exact latent gap (the unswept hunyuan_image3_transformer.py diffusion caller of get_cache_scale), which the human reviewers never mentioned. Y additionally reproduces GT's specific qwen2_old 'getattr guard = dead code, not regression' framing and its coordination-with-#4808 point almost verbatim, plus gives very concrete, quotable comment/test fixes, edging out X on recall and actionability. X's design verification against actual vLLM source is more rigorously grounded and its test-coverage critique (outer AutoWeightsLoader never actually exercised) is sharper than GT's own note, keeping precision high, but it covers slightly fewer of GT's specific points and includes a couple of lower-value asides.
